title: carex halleriana subsp. basilaris
intro: Carex halleriana subsp. basilaris, also known as the sedge or wood sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Carex, which includes a wide variety of sedges. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Carex halleriana subsp. basilaris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
